item.title: Donald Knuth: Ancient Babylonian Algorithms
item.description: Ref: https://fermatslibrary.com/p/06445717 This is such an intriguing paper on the history of computing, hence mathematics. I highly recommend reading it yourself. Few notes from the paper: Question: How is computer science connected with the human history further beyond the developments in the last century? Base 60 system instead of Base 10 for mathematics. Pergamonmusuem in Berlin houses a part of one of the clay tablets from Mesopotamia. I would have liked to see it but the museum is closed for renovations (for 14 years).
